summary: Operate SageMaker Studio: onboard a user profile, change the default app instance type (engineer-owned), tag domains and profiles for cost allocation, attach a Studio lifecycle config, and offboard (delete) a user profile. Runtime stop/start of Studio apps is not a Terraform operation and is excluded. Domains are delete-protected, so no operation replaces or destroys a domain.

operations.title: Onboard a new Studio user profile to a domain
operations.summary: Give a new analyst access to SageMaker Studio by creating their user profile. Doesn't disrupt existing users.
operations.description: Creates a new aws_sagemaker_user_profile in the selected domain so an analyst can sign in to SageMaker Studio. Additive and non-disruptive to existing users; the profile inherits the domain default execution role unless one is supplied.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: Studio domain the new user profile is created under.

params.name: user_profile_name
params.label: User profile name
params.help: Unique profile name within the domain, e.g. analyst-firmansyah. Cannot be changed after creation.

params.name: execution_role_arn
params.label: Execution role
params.help: IAM role the profile assumes for Studio jobs, picked from the account inventory. Leave empty to inherit the domain default; a console-created role must be adopted into the estate before it appears here.

operations.title: Change a user profile's default app instance type
operations.summary: Change this user's default Studio compute size. Running apps must restart to apply it, causing brief downtime.
operations.description: Updates the default_resource_spec instance_type for the profile's JupyterServer or KernelGateway app. Applies to the next app launch and affects per-hour Studio cost, so it is engineer-owned; running apps must be restarted to pick up the change.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose default app instance type will change.

params.name: app_type
params.label: App type
params.help: Which Studio app's default instance type to set.

params.name: new_instance_type
params.label: New instance type
params.help: Approved Studio instance types. Larger types raise hourly cost.

operations.title: Update tags on a Studio user profile
operations.summary: Add or update tags on this user profile; only the tags you list change. Metadata only, no effect on running apps.
operations.description: Sets or updates the tags map on a user profile for cost allocation and ownership tracking. Metadata-only change with no effect on running Studio apps.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile to retag.

params.name: new_tags
params.label: Tags
params.help: Full tag map to apply, e.g. {"cost-center":"research","owner":"firmansyah"}. Replaces the existing tag set.

operations.title: Attach a Studio lifecycle config to a domain default
operations.summary: Attach a startup script that runs when users launch this app type. A broken script can block everyone's app start, so it's reviewed first.
operations.description: Sets the lifecycle_config_arns association on the domain's default app settings so a startup script runs when users launch that app type. Affects all users under the domain on their next app start; a broken script can block app startup, so it is guardrailed.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: Domain whose default app settings will reference the lifecycle config.

params.name: app_type
params.label: App type
params.help: Which default app settings the lifecycle config attaches to.

params.name: lifecycle_config_arn
params.label: Lifecycle config ARN
params.help: ARN of an existing aws_sagemaker_studio_lifecycle_config in this account/region. Change-by-reference only.

operations.title: Update tags on a Studio domain
operations.summary: Add or update tags on this Studio domain; only the tags you list change. Metadata only, doesn't affect storage or running apps.
operations.description: Sets or updates the tags map on a SageMaker domain for cost allocation and ownership. Metadata-only; does not affect the domain's home EFS or any running apps.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The Studio domain to retag.

params.name: new_tags
params.label: Tags
params.help: Full tag map to apply, e.g. {"env":"prod","owner":"data-platform"}. Replaces the existing tag set.

operations.title: Offboard (delete) a Studio user profile
operations.summary: Permanently remove this user's Studio access and profile. This can't be undone, and unsaved files are lost; an engineer reviews it first.
operations.description: Destroys a user profile so the analyst can no longer access Studio. Irreversible; all of the profile's apps must already be deleted, and any files in the domain home directory that are not backed up elsewhere are lost. Engineer-owned.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile to permanently remove.

params.name: acknowledge_data_loss
params.label: Acknowledge irreversible data loss
params.help: Confirm the profile has no running apps and its home directory data is no longer needed.

operations.title: Set domain authentication mode (IAM or SSO)
operations.summary: Switch domain sign-in between IAM and SSO. Recreates the whole domain: an outage, and everyone must re-authenticate; engineer-handled.
operations.description: Sets the domain's auth_mode argument, switching how members sign in between IAM and SSO (IAM Identity Center). Domain-wide; every user must re-authenticate under the new mode.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: auth_mode
params.label: Authentication mode
params.help: IAM or SSO. Changing this re-authenticates all domain members.

operations.title: Set domain default EFS auto-mount for new profiles
operations.summary: Set whether new Studio profiles automatically mount their home storage by default. Existing profiles aren't affected.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.auto_mount_home_efs, the default home-directory EFS auto-mount behavior applied to newly created user profiles in the domain. Existing profiles are unaffected.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: auto_mount_mode
params.label: Auto-mount EFS mode
params.help: Default home-EFS auto-mount behavior for new profiles.

operations.title: Set domain default Studio web portal access for new profiles
operations.summary: Set whether new Studio profiles can access the Studio web interface by default. Existing profiles aren't affected.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.studio_web_portal (ENABLED or DISABLED), the domain default controlling whether newly created user profiles can access the Studio web UI. Existing profiles are unaffected.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: studio_web_portal
params.label: Studio web portal (default)
params.help: Whether new profiles can access the Studio web portal by default.

operations.title: Set domain default RStudioServerPro app access status
operations.summary: Set whether new Studio profiles can open the RStudio app by default. Existing profiles aren't affected.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.r_studio_server_pro_app_settings.access_status (ENABLED or DISABLED), the domain default controlling whether new profiles can open the RStudioServerPro app. Grants no new IAM permission.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: access_status
params.label: RStudioServerPro access status (default)
params.help: Whether new profiles can open the RStudioServerPro app by default.

operations.title: Set domain default RStudioServerPro permission level
operations.summary: Set the default RStudio permission level for new profiles. Granting admin rights is a privilege escalation, so an engineer reviews it.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.r_studio_server_pro_app_settings.user_group to R_STUDIO_USER or R_STUDIO_ADMIN, the domain-default RStudio permission level for new profiles. R_STUDIO_ADMIN grants administrative rights over the RStudioServerPro workbench (a privilege escalation), so an engineer authors and reviews the change.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: user_group
params.label: RStudioServerPro permission level (default)
params.help: R_STUDIO_ADMIN grants workbench-admin rights.

operations.title: Set Canvas OAuth data source (domain default)
operations.summary: Choose which external data source Canvas connects to by default for new profiles: Salesforce Genie or Snowflake.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.canvas_app_settings.identity_provider_oauth_settings.data_source_name to SalesforceGenie or Snowflake, selecting which external data source Canvas connects to via OAuth for the domain default.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: data_source_name
params.label: Canvas OAuth data source
params.help: External data source Canvas connects to via OAuth.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas OAuth connection (domain default)
operations.summary: Turn the Canvas OAuth connection to the configured data source on or off, as the default for new profiles.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.canvas_app_settings.identity_provider_oauth_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling whether the Canvas OAuth connection to the configured external data source is active for the domain default.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas OAuth status
params.help: Whether the Canvas OAuth data-source connection is enabled.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas EMR Serverless jobs (domain default)
operations.summary: Turn Canvas's ability to run EMR Serverless jobs on or off, as the default for new profiles.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.canvas_app_settings.emr_serverless_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling whether the EMR Serverless job capability is enabled in Canvas for the domain default (using the already-configured execution role).

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas EMR Serverless status
params.help: Whether EMR Serverless job capability is enabled in Canvas.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas Kendra document querying (domain default)
operations.summary: Turn Canvas's document search (Kendra) feature on or off, as the default for new profiles.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.canvas_app_settings.kendra_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling the document-querying (Kendra) feature in Canvas for the domain default.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas Kendra status
params.help: Whether Kendra document querying is enabled in Canvas.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas model registry integration (domain default)
operations.summary: Turn Canvas's model registry integration on or off, as the default for new profiles.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.canvas_app_settings.model_register_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling the cross-account model-registry integration in Canvas for the domain default (using the already-configured role).

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas model registry status
params.help: Whether the Canvas model-registry integration is enabled.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas time series forecasting (domain default)
operations.summary: Turn Canvas's time series forecasting feature on or off, as the default for new profiles.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.canvas_app_settings.time_series_forecasting_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling the time-series-forecasting capability in Canvas for the domain default (using the already-configured Amazon Forecast role).

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas forecasting status
params.help: Whether time series forecasting is enabled in Canvas.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas direct model deployment (domain default)
operations.summary: Allow or block Canvas from deploying models straight to production, as the domain default. Security-sensitive, so an engineer reviews it.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.canvas_app_settings.direct_deploy_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED). ENABLED grants permission to deploy ML models directly to production endpoints from Canvas, so an engineer authors and reviews the change.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas direct-deploy status
params.help: Whether direct model deployment to production endpoints is enabled in Canvas.

operations.title: Set domain default notebook output sharing
operations.summary: Set whether notebook output is included by default when new profiles share their notebooks.
operations.description: Sets default_user_settings.sharing_settings.notebook_output_option (Allowed or Disabled), the domain default controlling whether notebook cell output is included when new profiles share notebooks. Distinct from the user-profile-scoped sagemaker-toggle-notebook-output-sharing.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: notebook_output_option
params.label: Notebook output sharing (default)
params.help: Whether notebook cell output is included when sharing notebooks.

operations.title: Configure domain default app idle-shutdown policy
operations.summary: Set the default idle-shutdown timeout and allowed range for Studio apps, so unused sessions stop automatically.
operations.description: Configures the app_lifecycle_management.idle_settings idle-shutdown policy in the domain's default_user_settings for the chosen app type: whether idle shutdown is active (lifecycle_management), the default idle timeout, and the min/max timeout users may set. Only JupyterLab and Code Editor support this block. Groups these tightly-coupled fields into one operation because min <= default <= max must hold together.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: app_type
params.label: App type
params.help: Which domain-default app's idle-shutdown policy to configure. Only JupyterLab and Code Editor support app_lifecycle_management.

params.name: lifecycle_management
params.label: Idle shutdown activation
params.help: Whether idle shutdown is activated for the selected app type.

params.name: idle_timeout_in_minutes
params.label: Idle timeout (minutes)
params.help: Minutes SageMaker waits after an app becomes idle before shutting it down. Doc range 60-525600.

params.name: min_idle_timeout_in_minutes
params.label: Minimum idle timeout (minutes)
params.help: Lower bound (minutes) users may set for custom idle shutdown. Doc range 60-525600.

params.name: max_idle_timeout_in_minutes
params.label: Maximum idle timeout (minutes)
params.help: Upper bound (minutes) users may set for custom idle shutdown. Doc range 60-525600.

operations.title: Enable or disable domain Docker access
operations.summary: Allow or block everyone in this domain from building and running containers. This expands the attack surface, so an engineer reviews it.
operations.description: Sets domain_settings.docker_settings.enable_docker_access (ENABLED or DISABLED), which grants or removes the domain-wide ability to build, pull, and run containers. Expands attack surface for every user under the domain, so an engineer authors and reviews the change.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: enable_docker_access
params.label: Docker access
params.help: Whether the domain can access Docker (build/pull/run containers).

operations.title: Set domain execution-role source-identity config
operations.summary: Turn per-user CloudTrail attribution on or off for this domain. Disabling it hides who did what, so an engineer reviews it.
operations.description: Sets domain_settings.execution_role_identity_config to USER_PROFILE_NAME or DISABLED, controlling whether the user-profile name is attached to the execution role as sts:SourceIdentity. DISABLED removes per-user attribution in CloudTrail domain-wide, so an engineer authors and reviews the change.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: execution_role_identity_config
params.label: Execution-role source identity
params.help: USER_PROFILE_NAME attaches the profile name as sts:SourceIdentity; DISABLED removes it.

operations.title: Enable or disable Trusted Identity Propagation
operations.summary: Turn Trusted Identity Propagation on or off for this domain. Affects how user identity reaches other services; an engineer reviews it.
operations.description: Sets domain_settings.trusted_identity_propagation_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED). ENABLED is only valid when auth_mode is SSO. Affects how end-user identity is propagated to downstream AWS services for authorization decisions, so an engineer authors and reviews the change.

params.name: domain
params.label: Target domain
params.help: The SageMaker Studio domain to modify.

params.name: status
params.label: Trusted Identity Propagation status
params.help: Whether Trusted Identity Propagation is enabled. ENABLED requires auth_mode = SSO.

operations.title: Set RStudioServerPro app access for a user profile
operations.summary: Allow or block this user from opening the RStudio app. Takes effect the next time they launch it.
operations.description: Sets user_settings.r_studio_server_pro_app_settings.access_status (ENABLED or DISABLED) to control whether this Studio user profile can open the RStudioServerPro app. Reversible toggle that takes effect on next app launch; grants no new IAM permission on its own.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose RStudioServerPro app access will change.

params.name: access_status
params.label: RStudioServerPro app access
params.help: ENABLED lets the profile open the RStudioServerPro app; DISABLED blocks it.

operations.title: Set RStudioServerPro permission level (user group) for a user profile
operations.summary: Set this user's RStudio permission level. Granting admin rights is a privilege escalation, so an engineer reviews it.
operations.description: Sets user_settings.r_studio_server_pro_app_settings.user_group to R_STUDIO_USER or R_STUDIO_ADMIN. R_STUDIO_ADMIN grants administrative rights over the RStudioServerPro workbench (a privilege escalation that can affect other users/licenses), so an engineer authors and reviews the change.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose RStudioServerPro permission level will change.

params.name: user_group
params.label: RStudioServerPro permission level
params.help: R_STUDIO_USER is standard access; R_STUDIO_ADMIN grants workbench administrative rights.

operations.title: Set Canvas direct-deploy permission for a user profile
operations.summary: Allow or block this user from deploying models straight to production through Canvas. Security-sensitive, so an engineer reviews it.
operations.description: Sets user_settings.canvas_app_settings.direct_deploy_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), which grants or removes permission to deploy ML models directly to production endpoints from SageMaker Canvas. Security-sensitive permission change, so an engineer authors and reviews it.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose Canvas direct-deploy permission will change.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas direct-deploy permission
params.help: ENABLED lets Canvas deploy models directly to production endpoints; DISABLED removes that permission.

operations.title: Configure Canvas OAuth data-source connection for a user profile
operations.summary: Choose this user's Canvas data source (Salesforce Genie or Snowflake) and turn the OAuth connection on or off.
operations.description: Sets the Canvas identity_provider_oauth_settings data_source_name (SalesforceGenie or Snowflake) and status (ENABLED or DISABLED) for this profile: which external data source Canvas connects to via OAuth and whether that connection is active. The stored credential reference (secret_arn) is managed separately by an engineer.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose Canvas OAuth data-source connection will change.

params.name: data_source_name
params.label: OAuth data source
params.help: External data source Canvas connects to via OAuth.

params.name: oauth_status
params.label: OAuth connection status
params.help: Whether the OAuth connection to the selected data source is active.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas EMR Serverless for a user profile
operations.summary: Allow or block this user from running EMR Serverless jobs through Canvas.
operations.description: Sets user_settings.canvas_app_settings.emr_serverless_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling whether this profile can run EMR Serverless jobs from Canvas using the already-configured execution role. The role itself (execution_role_arn) is managed separately by an engineer.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose Canvas EMR Serverless capability will change.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas EMR Serverless status
params.help: Whether EMR Serverless job capability is enabled in Canvas for this profile.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas document querying (Kendra) for a user profile
operations.summary: Turn this user's Canvas document search (Kendra) feature on or off.
operations.description: Sets user_settings.canvas_app_settings.kendra_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling the Kendra-backed document-querying feature in Canvas for this profile. The kendra_settings block carries no other field, so this fully covers it.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose Canvas document-querying feature will change.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas Kendra status
params.help: Whether the document-querying (Kendra) feature is enabled in Canvas.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas model-registry integration for a user profile
operations.summary: Turn this user's Canvas model registry integration on or off.
operations.description: Sets user_settings.canvas_app_settings.model_register_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling the model-registry integration in Canvas for this profile. The cross-account model-register role ARN is managed separately by an engineer.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose Canvas model-registry integration will change.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas model-registry status
params.help: Whether the model-registry integration is enabled in Canvas.

operations.title: Enable or disable Canvas time-series forecasting for a user profile
operations.summary: Turn this user's Canvas time series forecasting feature on or off.
operations.description: Sets user_settings.canvas_app_settings.time_series_forecasting_settings.status (ENABLED or DISABLED), toggling the time-series-forecasting capability in Canvas for this profile. The Amazon Forecast role ARN is managed separately by an engineer.

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose Canvas time-series forecasting capability will change.

params.name: status
params.label: Canvas time-series forecasting status
params.help: Whether time-series forecasting is enabled in Canvas.

operations.title: Configure idle-shutdown settings for a user-profile JupyterLab app
operations.summary: Set the idle-shutdown timeout and allowed range for this user's JupyterLab app, so an unused session stops automatically.
operations.description: Configures user_settings.jupyter_lab_app_settings.app_lifecycle_management.idle_settings for this user profile: whether idle shutdown is active (lifecycle_management), the idle timeout, and the min/max timeout a user may self-select. All timeout values are bounded to the documented 60-525600 minute range. Cost/performance setting, reversible, no security impact. Only JupyterLab is offered: per the provider docs, code_editor_app_settings on aws_sagemaker_user_profile does not expose app_lifecycle_management (it supports only default_resource_spec, lifecycle_config_arns, custom_image).

params.name: user_profile
params.label: Target user profile
params.help: The Studio user profile whose JupyterLab idle-shutdown settings will change.

params.name: app_type
params.label: App type
params.help: Which app's idle-shutdown settings to configure. On aws_sagemaker_user_profile only JupyterLab exposes app_lifecycle_management (Code Editor does not), so JupyterLab is the only valid value.

params.name: lifecycle_management
params.label: Idle shutdown activated
params.help: Whether idle shutdown is activated for the JupyterLab app.

params.name: idle_timeout_in_minutes
params.label: Idle timeout (minutes)
params.help: Minutes SageMaker waits after the app becomes idle before shutting it down. Doc range 60-525600.

params.name: min_idle_timeout_in_minutes
params.label: Minimum user-configurable idle timeout (minutes)
params.help: Minimum idle timeout a user may set for custom idle shutdown. Doc range 60-525600.

params.name: max_idle_timeout_in_minutes
params.label: Maximum user-configurable idle timeout (minutes)
params.help: Maximum idle timeout a user may set for custom idle shutdown. Doc range 60-525600.
